# IMPLEMENTATION_INTEGRATION_PLAN.md
## HCI AI Operating System — Implementation Integration Plan

**Organization:** Hendrickson Construction, Inc.
**Owner:** @buck-HCI-AI
**Generated:** 2026-06-26
**Generated By:** Browser Claude (GitHub Administrator)
**Status:** ⏳ Awaiting Architecture Review by @buck-HCI-AI + ChatGPT
**Authority:** HCI_AI_CONSTITUTION.md — Requires human owner approval before execution

---

## Executive Summary

This document outlines the strategy for integrating the Program Repository governance layer with the existing HCI AI implementation work. It identifies overlap, gaps, and the recommended path to a unified operating system.

**Key Finding:** This repository (`buck-HCI-AI/HCI_AI_Operating_System`) already contains both governance AND implementation. The most likely scenario is that Claude Code also worked in this same repository. The integration plan therefore focuses on **alignment and activation**, not on merging separate codebases.

**Recommended Action:** Activate the governance layer over the existing implementation, align agent roles to actual work, and begin Sprint 1 with a full state synchronization.

---

## Overlap Analysis

### Areas With No Conflict
The governance layer was designed to NOT touch implementation files. No overlap was created.

| Governance Layer | Implementation Layer | Overlap? |
|---|---|---|
| Root-level .md files | 03_Source_Code/ | ❌ None |
| .github/ configuration | 04_Workflows/ | ❌ None |
| houzz/ design docs | 05_Database/ | ❌ None |
| PROJECT.md backlog | docker-compose.yml | ❌ None |

### Potential Misalignment Areas

| Area | Issue | Resolution |
|---|---|---|
| TASKS.md assigns Claude Code tasks (AUTO-004 through AUTO-025) | Claude Code may have already completed some | ChatGPT must audit Claude Code's work and mark completed tasks done |
| PROJECT.md Integration Registry shows HubSpot/Drive as "Pending setup" | Claude Code may have already connected these | Requires Claude Code to confirm API connection status |
| AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE.md defines 8 recurring automations | n8n may already have some of these running | Requires n8n audit — list all active workflows |
| AI_TEAM_CHARTER.md defines agent roles | Claude Code's master prompt may define different boundaries | Human owner must review and align |
| WF-001 through WF-006 listed as "Not built" in README | Some may exist in implementation | ChatGPT must verify against 04_Workflows/ |

## Integration Scenarios

### Scenario A: Single Repository (Recommended — Likely Correct)

Claude Code worked in THIS repository (buck-HCI-AI/HCI_AI_Operating_System). The governance layer was added on top of existing implementation work. No repository merge is needed.

**Integration Steps:**
1. ChatGPT audits 03_Source_Code/ and 04_Workflows/ to update TASKS.md with actual completion status
2. Claude Code reviews governance docs and confirms compliance with HCI_AI_CONSTITUTION.md
3. Human owner reviews PROGRAM_REPOSITORY_STATUS.md and confirms current state
4. Sprint 1 begins with full state sync

**Effort:** Low. Primarily documentation and alignment.

### Scenario B: Separate Implementation Repository

Claude Code worked in a different repository. Two repos exist. Merge is required.

**Integration Steps:**
1. Human owner identifies the implementation repository URL
2. Human owner decides: merge via PR, subtree import, or maintain as separate repo
3. If merging: implementation code moves into 03_Source_Code/ and 04_Workflows/ here
4. Governance from this repo becomes authoritative for both
5. Implementation repo is archived after merge is verified

**Effort:** Medium. Requires human decision and git merge operation.

### Scenario C: Parallel Operation (Temporary — Not Recommended)

Two repos operate in parallel during transition. Governance lives here; implementation stays in separate repo.

**Coordination Protocol:**
1. LIVE_PROJECT_STATE.md in this repo is the shared truth document
2. Claude Code reads governance from this repo, works in implementation repo
3. All sprint tasks authored here; Claude Code links PRs back to this repo's issues
4. This repo's PROJECT.md is authoritative for all sprint planning
5. Merge to single repo target: Sprint 2

**Effort:** High coordination overhead. Acceptable only as short-term bridge.

---

## Recommended Integration Steps (Pending Architecture Review)

### Phase 0: State Synchronization (Sprint 0 Close — Immediate)
> Do before Sprint 1 begins. Requires human owner confirmation.

| Step | Action | Owner | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| INT-001 | Human owner confirms: single repo or two repos? | @buck-HCI-AI | ⏳ Pending |
| INT-002 | Human owner identifies any Claude Code implementation repo | @buck-HCI-AI | ⏳ Pending |
| INT-003 | ChatGPT audits 04_Workflows/ for actual workflow count and status | ChatGPT | ⏳ Pending |
| INT-004 | Claude Code confirms HubSpot and Google Drive API connection status | Claude Code | ⏳ Pending |
| INT-005 | Claude Code confirms Qdrant and Postgres status (live or not) | Claude Code | ⏳ Pending |
| INT-006 | n8n confirms all active workflow names and schedules | n8n | ⏳ Pending |
| INT-007 | ChatGPT updates TASKS.md with actual completion status | ChatGPT | ⏳ Pending |
| INT-008 | Human owner approves LIVE_PROJECT_STATE.md as shared truth | @buck-HCI-AI | ⏳ Pending |

### Phase 1: Governance Activation (Sprint 1)
> Apply governance layer to all existing implementation work.

| Step | Action | Owner |
|---|---|---|
| INT-009 | Register all existing n8n workflows in AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE.md | n8n + ChatGPT |
| INT-010 | Register all existing API connections in PROJECT.md Integration Registry | Claude Code |
| INT-011 | Add all pre-existing Claude Code work to TASKS.md as completed items | ChatGPT |
| INT-012 | Enable branch protection on main | @buck-HCI-AI |
| INT-013 | Verify all implementation code is covered by CODEOWNERS | Browser Claude |
| INT-014 | Create CHANGELOG.md with all historical work documented | Claude Code |

### Phase 2: Full Coordination (Sprint 2)
> Full HCI AI Operating System running under unified governance.

| Step | Action | Owner |
|---|---|---|
| INT-015 | LIVE_PROJECT_STATE.md populated and updating automatically | All agents |
| INT-016 | All 8 recurring automations active in n8n | n8n |
| INT-017 | All API connections registered and health-checked | Claude Code + n8n |
| INT-018 | All agent roles operating within Charter boundaries | All agents |
| INT-019 | Sprint 2 kickoff using full document chain | ChatGPT |

| docker-compose.yml | 🔒 Do not modify without sprint task | Infrastructure definition |
| All pre-existing source code | 🔒 Do not modify without approved sprint task | Implementation work |

## Questions for Architecture Review

The following require human owner decision before Sprint 1:

1. **Does a separate Claude Code implementation repository exist?** If yes, what is its URL?
2. **Should the two repositories be merged into one?** (Recommended: Yes)
3. **Which sprint tasks from TASKS.md has Claude Code already completed?**
4. **Are Postgres and Qdrant live, or still pending deployment?**
5. **What n8n workflows exist beyond WF-007?**
6. **Should ChatGPT or Claude Code author CURRENT_SPRINT.md?**
7. **What is the target date for Sprint 1 kickoff?**

---

## Success Definition

Integration is complete when:
- [ ] Single authoritative repository confirmed
- [ ] All agent work visible in TASKS.md (done + todo)
- [ ] LIVE_PROJECT_STATE.md accurately reflects system state
- [ ] All agents operating within Charter boundaries
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md populated with all historical work
- [ ] Branch protection enabled
- [ ] Sprint 1 kicked off under unified governance
